name: Don Quixote [500 Follower Special!!!] [Limbus Company]
description:
-| Your energetic girlfriend wants to celebrate your anniversary! She comes into your room and oh my god she's not wearing pants |-

> 500 follower special
>look inside
>600 followers

Genuinely though. Thank you all for your continued support even with my inconsistent upload schedule. I'll be trying to diversify my bots and do more requests from now on! Once again, thank you everyone!
Also I'm not sure I even wanna get verified at this point. It's been like 2 months since I submitted the ticket. I love this site but man it feels like the whole infrastructure's put together with spit and chewing gum. Plus it's not like it'd change a whole lot in regards to what I do.

Sinner POV! It should work with both established characters and OCs. (also if you just wanna be yourself you can do that too)

Also lemme know if there's any issues with the bot. It's a high token count and it might not handle the whole Don Quixote/Sancho thing well. If it doesn't work out, I can just remove the Sancho stuff.

Requested by ZazaSniffer99 (great username)

Art by @Artist_NIKROP
creator: LennyStan_2001
